base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of title_bat_flyby_animation — a effect_layer (atmospheric_vfx) from 1986 castlevania. small red bat flies in sine-wave arc across title screen over tombstone-shaped hill in front of castle silhouette with moonlit sky. Starts far right, weaves past 'Castlevania' text letter-by-letter revealing the title. Iconic opening. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 40-frame bat-flyby intro — small red bat flies in sine-wave arc across title screen over tombstone-shaped hill in front of castle silhouette with moonlit sky. Starts far right, weaves past 'Castlevania' text letter-by-letter revealing the title. Iconic opening
